diff.patch:
diff --git a/apps/web/src/projectflow/genomes/baseline.ts b/apps/web/src/projectflow/genomes/evolved.ts
index 765faac..bb5ec97 100644
--- a/apps/web/src/projectflow/genomes/baseline.ts
+++ b/apps/web/src/projectflow/genomes/evolved.ts
@@ -1,17 +1,16 @@
 import type { ProjectFlowGenome } from './types';
 
-export const baselineGenome: ProjectFlowGenome = {
-  version: 'v1.0',
-  initialRoute: 'dashboard',
-  taskDestination: 'tasks',
-  globalSearch: false,
-  globalQuickCreate: false,
-  showIndirectTaskPath: true,
+export const evolvedGenome: ProjectFlowGenome = {
+  version: 'v1.1',
+  initialRoute: 'my-work',
+  taskDestination: 'my-work',
+  globalSearch: true,
+  globalQuickCreate: true,
+  showIndirectTaskPath: false,
   navigation: [
-    { route: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', icon: 'home' },
+    { route: 'my-work', label: 'My Work', icon: 'my-work', count: 4 },
     { route: 'projects', label: 'Projects', icon: 'projects', count: 4 },
-    { route: 'tasks', label: 'Tasks', icon: 'tasks', count: 26 },
-    { route: 'reports', label: 'Reports', icon: 'reports' },
+    { route: 'insights', label: 'Insights', icon: 'insights' },
     { route: 'settings', label: 'Settings', icon: 'settings' },
   ],
 };
